Creates a process tool provider binding.

## Import

```ts
import { processToolProviderBinding } from "@graphrefly/ts/executors/tool-provider-adapters";
```

## Signature

```ts
function processToolProviderBinding(opts: ProcessToolProviderBindingOptions = {}): ToolProviderAdapterBinding<ProcessToolArguments, ProcessToolResult>
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `opts` | `ProcessToolProviderBindingOptions` | Options that configure the helper. |

## Returns

The process tool provider binding result.

## Example

```ts
import { processToolProviderBinding } from "@graphrefly/ts/executors/tool-provider-adapters";
```
